steps.title: Simplify the two roots
steps.content:
Simplify under the radical and in the denominator:
$$
x=\frac{-5\pm\sqrt{105}}{8}
$$
The greater solution uses the plus sign.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Entering the equation in a graphing calculator also shows the greater root is the one with the plus sign in the numerator. The answer is B.
